trigger_cases.prompt: Run the post-amc phase, NVDA just reported
Build a laddered limit order for AAPL — buy 25 shares around $180
What's on the earnings calendar tonight?
I want the bot to scan tomorrow's pre-market earnings reactions
Send the proposed trades to discord for me to approve
trigger_cases.rationale: Discord approval flow is core to this skill.

should_not_trigger_cases.prompt: Fix the typo in the README
Show me the stock chart for AAPL
What time does the market open?
should_not_trigger_cases.rationale: General market info, no trade intent.
